tha17:1.2:
p_19Th1_1298
Pāsādike bahū disvā,
bhāvitatte susaṁvute;
Isi
paṇḍarasagotto
,
apucchi phussasavhayaṁ.
p_19Th1_1299
"Kiṁchandā kimadhippāyā,
kimākappā bhavissare;
Anāgatamhi kālamhi,
taṁ me akkhāhi pucchito".
p_19Th1_1300
"Suṇohi vacanaṁ mayhaṁ,
isipaṇḍarasavhaya;
Sakkaccaṁ upadhārehi,
ācikkhissāmyanāgataṁ.
p_19Th1_1301
Kodhanā upanāhī ca,
makkhī thambhī saṭhā bahū;
Ussukī nānāvādā ca,
bhavissanti anāgate.
p_19Th1_1302
Aññātamānino dhamme,
gambhīre tīragocarā;
Lahukā agarū dhamme,
aññamaññamagāravā.
tha17:2.2:
p_19Th1_1303
Bahū ādīnavā loke,
uppajjissantyanāgate;
Sudesitaṁ imaṁ dhammaṁ,
kilesessanti
dummatī.
tha17:2.3:
p_19Th1_1304
Guṇahīnāpi saṁghamhi,
voharantā
visāradā;
Balavanto bhavissanti,
mukharā assutāvino.
p_19Th1_1305
Guṇavantopi saṁghamhi,
voharantā yathātthato;
Dubbalā te bhavissanti,
hirīmanā anatthikā.
p_19Th1_1306
Rajataṁ jātarūpañca,
khettaṁ vatthumajeḷakaṁ;
Dāsidāsañca dummedhā,
sādiyissantyanāgate.
p_19Th1_1307
Ujjhānasaññino bālā,
sīlesu asamāhitā;
Unnaḷā vicarissanti,
kalahābhiratā magā.
p_19Th1_1308
Uddhatā ca bhavissanti,
nīlacīvarapārutā;
Kuhā thaddhā lapā siṅgī,
carissantyariyā viya.
p_19Th1_1309
Telasaṇṭhehi kesehi,
capalā añjanakkhikā;
Rathiyāya gamissanti,
dantavaṇṇikapārutā.
tha17:2.4:
p_19Th1_1310
Ajegucchaṁ vimuttehi,
surattaṁ arahaddhajaṁ;
Jigucchissanti kāsāvaṁ,
odātesu samucchitā.
p_19Th1_1311
Lābhakāmā bhavissanti,
kusītā hīnavīriyā;
Kicchantā vanapatthāni,
gāmantesu vasissare.
p_19Th1_1312
Ye ye lābhaṁ labhissanti,
micchājīvaratā sadā;
Te teva anusikkhantā,
bhajissanti asaṁyatā.
p_19Th1_1313
Ye ye alābhino lābhaṁ,
na te pujjā bhavissare;
Supesalepi te dhīre,
sevissanti na te tadā.
p_19Th1_1314
Milakkhurajanaṁ
rattaṁ,
garahantā sakaṁ dhajaṁ;
Titthiyānaṁ dhajaṁ keci,
dhārissantyavadātakaṁ.
p_19Th1_1315
Agāravo ca kāsāve,
tadā tesaṁ bhavissati;
Paṭisaṅkhā ca kāsāve,
bhikkhūnaṁ na bhavissati.
p_19Th1_1316
Abhibhūtassa dukkhena,
sallaviddhassa ruppato;
Paṭisaṅkhā mahāghorā,
nāgassāsi acintiyā.
p_19Th1_1317
Chaddanto hi tadā disvā,
surattaṁ arahaddhajaṁ;
Tāvadeva bhaṇī gāthā,
gajo atthopasaṁhitā.
p_19Th1_1318
‘Anikkasāvo kāsāvaṁ,
yo vatthaṁ
paridhassati
;
Apeto damasaccena,
na so kāsāvamarahati.
p_19Th1_1319
Yo ca vantakasāvassa,
sīlesu susamāhito;
Upeto damasaccena,
sa ve kāsāvamarahati.
tha17:2.5:
p_19Th1_1320
Vipannasīlo dummedho,
pākaṭo kāmakāriyo;
Vibbhantacitto nissukko,
na so kāsāvamarahati.
p_19Th1_1321
Yo ca sīlena sampanno,
vītarāgo samāhito;
Odātamanasaṅkappo,
sa ve kāsāvamarahati.
p_19Th1_1322
Uddhato unnaḷo bālo,
sīlaṁ yassa na vijjati;
Odātakaṁ arahati,
kāsāvaṁ kiṁ karissati.
p_19Th1_1323
Bhikkhū ca bhikkhuniyo ca,
duṭṭhacittā anādarā;
Tādīnaṁ mettacittānaṁ,
niggaṇhissantyanāgate.
p_19Th1_1324
Sikkhāpentāpi therehi,
bālā cīvaradhāraṇaṁ;
Na suṇissanti dummedhā,
pākaṭā kāmakāriyā.
p_19Th1_1325
Te tathā sikkhitā bālā,
aññamaññaṁ agāravā;
Nādiyissantupajjhāye,
khaḷuṅko viya sārathiṁ.
p_19Th1_1326
Evaṁ anāgataddhānaṁ,
paṭipatti bhavissati;
Bhikkhūnaṁ bhikkhunīnañca,
patte kālamhi pacchime’.
p_19Th1_1327
Purā āgacchate etaṁ,
anāgataṁ mahabbhayaṁ;
Subbacā hotha sakhilā,
aññamaññaṁ sagāravā.
p_19Th1_1328
Mettacittā kāruṇikā,
Hotha sīlesu saṁvutā;
Āraddhavīriyā pahitattā,
Niccaṁ daḷhaparakkamā.
p_19Th1_1329
Pamādaṁ bhayato disvā,
Appamādañca khemato;
Bhāvethaṭṭhaṅgikaṁ maggaṁ,
Phusantā
amataṁ padan”ti.
tha17:3.2:
p_19Th1_1331
"Yathācārī yathāsato satīmā,
Yatasaṅkappajjhāyi
appamatto;
Ajjhattarato samāhitatto,
Eko santusito tamāhu bhikkhuṁ.
p_19Th1_1332
Allaṁ sukkhaṁ
vā
bhuñjanto,
Na bāḷhaṁ suhito siyā;
Ūnūdaro mitāhāro,
Sato bhikkhu paribbaje.
p_19Th1_1333
Cattāro pañca ālope,
abhutvā udakaṁ pive;
Alaṁ phāsuvihārāya,
pahitattassa bhikkhuno.
p_19Th1_1334
Kappiyaṁ tañce chādeti,
cīvaraṁ
idamatthikaṁ
;
Alaṁ phāsuvihārāya,
pahitattassa bhikkhuno.
tha17:4.2:
p_19Th1_1335
Pallaṅkena nisinnassa,
jaṇṇuke nābhivassati;
Alaṁ phāsuvihārāya,
pahitattassa bhikkhuno.
p_19Th1_1336
Yo sukhaṁ dukkhato adda,
dukkhamaddakkhi sallato;
Ubhayantarena
nāhosi,
kena lokasmi kiṁ siyā.
tha17:5.2:
p_19Th1_1337
Mā me kadāci pāpiccho,
kusīto hīnavīriyo;
Appassuto anādaro,
kena lokasmi kiṁ siyā.
tha17:6.2:
p_19Th1_1338
Bahussuto ca medhāvī,
sīlesu susamāhito;
Cetosamathamanuyutto,
api muddhani tiṭṭhatu.
tha17:7.2:
p_19Th1_1339
Yo papañcamanuyutto,
papañcābhirato mago;
Virādhayī so nibbānaṁ,
yogakkhemaṁ anuttaraṁ.
p_19Th1_1340
Yo ca papañcaṁ hitvāna,
nippapañcapathe rato;
Ārādhayī so nibbānaṁ,
yogakkhemaṁ anuttaraṁ.
p_19Th1_1341
Gāme vā yadi vāraññe,
Ninne vā yadi vā thale;
Yattha arahanto viharanti,
Taṁ bhūmirāmaṇeyyakaṁ.
p_19Th1_1342
Ramaṇīyāni
araññāni,
yattha na ramatī jano;
Vītarāgā ramissanti,
na te kāmagavesino.
tha17:8.2:
p_19Th1_1343
Nidhīnaṁva pavattāraṁ,
yaṁ passe vajjadassinaṁ;
Niggayhavādiṁ medhāviṁ,
tādisaṁ paṇḍitaṁ bhaje;
Tādisaṁ bhajamānassa,
seyyo hoti na pāpiyo.
p_19Th1_1344
Ovadeyyānusāseyya,
asabbhā ca nivāraye;
Satañhi so piyo hoti,
asataṁ hoti appiyo.
p_19Th1_1345
Aññassa bhagavā buddho,
dhammaṁ desesi cakkhumā;
Dhamme desiyamānamhi,
sotamodhesimatthiko;
Taṁ me amoghaṁ savanaṁ,
vimuttomhi anāsavo.
p_19Th1_1346
Neva pubbenivāsāya,
napi dibbassa cakkhuno;
Cetopariyāya iddhiyā,
cutiyā upapattiyā;
Sotadhātuvisuddhiyā,
paṇidhī me na vijjati".
tha17:9.2:
p_19Th1_1347
"Rukkhamūlaṁva nissāya,
muṇḍo saṅghāṭipāruto;
Paññāya uttamo thero,
upatissova
jhāyati.
p_19Th1_1348
Avitakkaṁ samāpanno,
sammāsambuddhasāvako;
Ariyena tuṇhībhāvena,
upeto hoti tāvade.
tha17:10.2:
p_19Th1_1349
Yathāpi pabbato selo,
acalo suppatiṭṭhito;
Evaṁ
mohakkhayā
bhikkhu,
pabbatova na vedhati".
p_19Th1_1350
"Anaṅgaṇassa posassa,
niccaṁ sucigavesino;
Vālaggamattaṁ pāpassa,
abbhamattaṁva khāyati.
p_19Th1_1351
Nābhinandāmi maraṇaṁ,
nābhinandāmi jīvitaṁ;
Nikkhipissaṁ imaṁ kāyaṁ,
sampajāno patissato.
tha17:11.2:
p_19Th1_1352
Nābhinandāmi maraṇaṁ,
nābhinandāmi jīvitaṁ;
Kālañca paṭikaṅkhāmi,
nibbisaṁ bhatako yathā".
p_19Th1_1353
"Ubhayena midaṁ maraṇameva,
Nāmaraṇaṁ pacchā vā pure vā;
Paṭipajjatha mā vinassatha,
Khaṇo vo mā upaccagā.
tha17:12.2:
p_19Th1_1354
Nagaraṁ yathā paccantaṁ,
guttaṁ santarabāhiraṁ;
Evaṁ gopetha attānaṁ,
khaṇo vo mā upaccagā;
Khaṇātītā hi socanti,
nirayamhi samappitā".
p_19Th1_1355
"Upasanto uparato,
mantabhāṇī anuddhato;
Dhunāti pāpake dhamme,
dumapattaṁva māluto.
p_19Th1_1356
Upasanto uparato,
mantabhāṇī anuddhato;
Appāsi
pāpake dhamme,
dumapattaṁva māluto.
p_19Th1_1357
Upasanto anāyāso,
vippasanno anāvilo;
Kalyāṇasīlo medhāvī,
dukkhassantakaro siyā".
p_19Th1_1358
"Na vissase ekatiyesu evaṁ,
Agārisu pabbajitesu
cāpi
;
Sādhūpi hutvā na asādhu honti,
Asādhu hutvā puna sādhu honti.
tha17:13.2:
p_19Th1_1359
Kāmacchando ca byāpādo,
thinamiddhañca bhikkhuno;
Uddhaccaṁ vicikicchā ca,
pañcete cittakelisā.
p_19Th1_1360
Yassa sakkariyamānassa,
asakkārena cūbhayaṁ;
Samādhi na vikampati,
appamādavihārino.
p_19Th1_1361
Taṁ jhāyinaṁ sātatikaṁ,
sukhumadiṭṭhivipassakaṁ;
Upādānakkhayārāmaṁ,
āhu sappuriso iti.
p_19Th1_1362
Mahāsamuddo pathavī,
pabbato anilopi ca;
Upamāya na yujjanti,
satthu varavimuttiyā.
p_19Th1_1363
Cakkānuvattako thero,
mahāñāṇī samāhito;
Pathavāpaggisamāno,
na rajjati na dussati.
tha17:14.2:
p_19Th1_1364
Paññāpāramitaṁ patto,
mahābuddhi
mahāmati
;
Ajaḷo jaḷasamāno,
sadā carati nibbuto.
p_19Th1_1365
Pariciṇṇo mayā satthā,
… pe …
bhavanetti samūhatā.
tha17:15.2:
p_19Th1_1366
Sampādethappamādena,
esā me anusāsanī;
Handāhaṁ parinibbissaṁ,
vippamuttomhi sabbadhī"ti.
tha17:16.2:
p_19Th1_1368
"Pisuṇena ca kodhanena ca,
Maccharinā ca vibhūtanandinā;
Sakhitaṁ na kareyya paṇḍito,
Pāpo kāpurisena saṅgamo.
p_19Th1_1369
Saddhena ca pesalena ca,
Paññavatā bahussutena ca;
Sakhitaṁ kareyya paṇḍito,
Bhaddo sappurisena saṅgamo.
tha17:16.3:
p_19Th1_1370
Passa cittakataṁ bimbaṁ,
… pe …
yassa natthi dhuvaṁ ṭhiti.
tha17:16.4:
p_19Th1_1371
Passa cittakataṁ bimbaṁ,
… pe …
vatthehi sobhati.
tha17:17.2:
p_19Th1_1372
Alattakakatā,
… pe …
no ca pāragavesino.
tha17:18.2:
p_19Th1_1373
Aṭṭhapadakatā,
… pe …
no ca pāragavesino.
tha17:18.3:
p_19Th1_1374
Añjanīva navā,
… pe …
no ca pāragavesino.
tha17:19.2:
p_19Th1_1375
Bahussuto cittakathī,
buddhassa paricārako;
Pannabhāro visaññutto,
seyyaṁ kappeti gotamo.
p_19Th1_1376
Khīṇāsavo visaññutto,
saṅgātīto sunibbuto;
Dhāreti antimaṁ dehaṁ,
jātimaraṇapāragū.
p_19Th1_1377
Yasmiṁ patiṭṭhitā dhammā,
buddhassādiccabandhuno;
Nibbānagamane magge,
soyaṁ tiṭṭhati gotamo.
p_19Th1_1378
Dvāsīti buddhato gaṇhiṁ,
dve sahassāni bhikkhuto;
Caturāsītisahassāni,
ye me dhammā pavattino.
p_19Th1_1379
Appassutāyaṁ puriso,
balibaddova jīrati;
Maṁsāni tassa vaḍḍhanti,
paññā tassa na vaḍḍhati.
tha17:20.2:
p_19Th1_1380
Bahussuto appassutaṁ,
yo sutenātimaññati;
Andho padīpadhārova,
tatheva paṭibhāti maṁ.
p_19Th1_1381
Bahussutaṁ upāseyya,
sutañca na vināsaye;
Taṁ mūlaṁ brahmacariyassa,
tasmā dhammadharo siyā.
p_19Th1_1382
Pubbāparaññū atthaññū,
niruttipadakovido;
Suggahītañca gaṇhāti,
atthañcopaparikkhati.
p_19Th1_1383
Khantyā chandikato
hoti,
ussahitvā tuleti taṁ;
Samaye so padahati,
ajjhattaṁ susamāhito.
p_19Th1_1384
Bahussutaṁ dhammadharaṁ,
sappaññaṁ buddhasāvakaṁ;
Dhammaviññāṇamākaṅkhaṁ,
taṁ bhajetha tathāvidhaṁ.
p_19Th1_1385
Bahussuto dhammadharo,
kosārakkho mahesino;
Cakkhu sabbassa lokassa,
pūjanīyo bahussuto.
p_19Th1_1386
Dhammārāmo dhammarato,
dhammaṁ anuvicintayaṁ;
Dhammaṁ anussaraṁ bhikkhu,
saddhammā na parihāyati.
p_19Th1_1387
Kāyamaccheragaruno
hiyyamāne
anuṭṭhahe;
Sarīrasukhagiddhassa,
kuto samaṇaphāsutā.
p_19Th1_1388
Na pakkhanti disā sabbā,
dhammā na paṭibhanti maṁ;
Gate kalyāṇamittamhi,
andhakāraṁva khāyati.
p_19Th1_1389
Abbhatītasahāyassa,
atītagatasatthuno;
Natthi etādisaṁ mittaṁ,
yathā kāyagatā sati.
p_19Th1_1390
Ye purāṇā atītā te,
navehi na sameti me;
Svajja ekova jhāyāmi,
vassupetova pakkhimā".
p_19Th1_1391
"Dassanāya
abhikkante
,
nānāverajjake bahū;
Mā vārayittha sotāro,
passantu samayo mamaṁ".
p_19Th1_1392
"Dassanāya
abhikkante
,
nānāverajjake puthu;
Karoti satthā okāsaṁ,
na nivāreti cakkhumā.
p_19Th1_1393
Paṇṇavīsativassāni,
sekhabhūtassa me sato;
Na kāmasaññā uppajji,
passa dhammasudhammataṁ.
p_19Th1_1394
Paṇṇavīsativassāni,
sekhabhūtassa me sato;
Na dosasaññā uppajji,
passa dhammasudhammataṁ.
p_19Th1_1395
Paṇṇavīsativassāni,
bhagavantaṁ upaṭṭhahiṁ;
Mettena kāyakammena,
chāyāva
anapāyinī
.
p_19Th1_1396
Paṇṇavīsativassāni,
bhagavantaṁ upaṭṭhahiṁ;
Mettena vacīkammena,
chāyāva anapāyinī.
p_19Th1_1397
Paṇṇavīsativassāni,
bhagavantaṁ upaṭṭhahiṁ;
Mettena manokammena,
chāyāva anapāyinī.
p_19Th1_1398
Buddhassa caṅkamantassa,
piṭṭhito anucaṅkamiṁ;
Dhamme desiyamānamhi,
ñāṇaṁ me udapajjatha.
p_19Th1_1399
Ahaṁ sakaraṇīyomhi,
sekho appattamānaso;
Satthu ca parinibbānaṁ,
yo amhaṁ anukampako.
p_19Th1_1400
Tadāsi yaṁ bhiṁsanakaṁ,
tadāsi lomahaṁsanaṁ;
Sabbākāravarūpete,
sambuddhe parinibbute".
p_19Th1_1401
"Bahussuto dhammadharo,
kosārakkho mahesino;
Cakkhu sabbassa lokassa,
ānando parinibbuto.
p_19Th1_1402
Bahussuto dhammadharo,
kosārakkho mahesino;
Cakkhu sabbassa lokassa,
andhakāre tamonudo.
p_19Th1_1403
Gatimanto satimanto,
dhitimanto ca yo isi;
Saddhammadhārako thero,
ānando ratanākaro".
p_19Th1_1404
"Pariciṇṇo mayā satthā,
kataṁ buddhassa sāsanaṁ;
Ohito garuko bhāro,
natthi dāni punabbhavo"ti.
